text:
Asia/Shanghai in 1890 was LMT (UTC+8:05:43). US/Pacific in 1890 was LMT (UTC-7:52:58).  
Time difference: UTC-7:52:58 minus UTC+8:05:43 = -15:58:41 ≈ -15 hours 59 minutes.  
2 PM (14:00) Jan 16 Shanghai minus 15h59m = 22:01 previous day = 22:01 on January 15, 1890.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1890-01-15 22:01
